chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.2136 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 31.03.2026 Mr. Sahir Ayaz Palijo advocate for petitioners. M/s. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. Sindh and Nazar Muhammad Memon A.P.G. Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Tariq Memon I.O. of crime No.546/2025 and ASI Liaquat Ali on behalf of I/c Naseeem Nagar PS. The petitioners pray for quashment of FIR No.546/2025 lodged against them at P.S. Qasimabad, alleging that they trespassed upon the land of the informant and started demolishing the boundary wall there at; that when the informant tried to stop the petitioners, the latter threatened them with firearms. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that this is the third FIR against them in respect of the same property by the same informant, and therefore, it is apparent that process of law is being abused. However, perusal of previous two FIRs reflects that those were lodged for separate albeit similar incidents. Without investigation into the facts, the ground of abuse of process cannot be adjudicated. Therefore, as and when investigation of subject FIR is complete, the petitioner may avail the alternate remedy available before the trial Court under section 249-A/265-K Cr.P.C., as the case may be. The I.O. shall complete the investigation expeditiously. Petition is disposed of in said terms. Copy of this order shall be communicated to SSP Hyderabad. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
